revision.comment: Bot: mark 1 deleted QID(s) as DELETED_QID in ill templates [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23989927232|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:縣神社 (大網白里市)]] {{Infobox religious building|image=File:Agatajinja.jpg|prefecture={{ill|Oamishirasato|qid=Q1203251|1=Ōamishirasato}}|coordinates={{Coord|35.542453|N|140.298061|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}|deity={{ill|Amaterasu|qid=Q455602|1=Amaterasu}}; {{ill|Ototachibanahime|qid=Q11487396|1=Tachibanahime-no-Mikoto}}; {{ill|Ōjin|qid=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}}}}
{{infobox Shinto shrine | Name = Agata Shrine | image = [[File:Agatajinja.jpg|300px|Agata Shrine]] | location = {{ill|Ōamishirasato|en|Ōamishirasato|qid=Q1203251|lt=Ōamishirasato, Chiba|1=Ōamishirasato}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|qid=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture|1=Chiba Prefecture}} Toke Tobichi 1876 | coordinates = {{Coord|35|32|32.83|N|140|17|53.02|E|scale:30000|qq=}} | deity = {{ill|Ōhirume-no-Mikoto|ja|大日孁尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōhirume-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōhirume-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天照大神|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天照大神|1=Amaterasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata}}, {{ill|Tachibanahime-no-Mikoto|ja|橘比賣命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachibanahime-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachibanahime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弟橘媛|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弟橘媛}}, {{ill|Hondawake-no-Mikoto|ja|譽田別命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hondawake-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hondawake-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Emperor Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q317997}} | type = {{ill|Village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q712534}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q712534}} | Established = | Other Names = | Main Hall = | festival = | Rituals = }} '''Agata Shrine''' (縣神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Ōamishirasato|en|Ōamishirasato|qid=Q1203251|lt=Ōamishirasato, Chiba|1=Ōamishirasato}}, formerly part of {{ill|Sanbu District|en|Sanbu District|qid=Q1153740|lt=Sanbu District, Chiba|1=Sanbu District}}, in {{ill|Kazusa Province|en|Kazusa Province|qid=Q1055394|lt=Kazusa Province|1=Kazusa Province}}. The former shrine Rank under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|en|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qid=Q712534|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}} was that of a {{ill|village shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q712534}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/village shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q712534}}. == Deities == The shrine enshrines: * {{ill|Ōhirume-no-Mikoto|ja|大日孁尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōhirume-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōhirume-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天照大神|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天照大神|1=Amaterasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata}} (Ōhirume-no-Mikoto), * {{ill|Tachibanahime-no-Mikoto|ja|橘比賣命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachibanahime-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachibanahime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弟橘媛|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弟橘媛}} (Tachibanahime-no-Mikoto), * {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|en|Emperor Ōjin|qid=Q317997|lt=Emperor Ōjin|1=Emperor Ōjin}} as {{ill|Hondawake-no-Mikoto|ja|譽田別命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hondawake-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hondawake-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Emperor Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q317997}}. == History == Although the exact date of the shrine's founding is unknown, tradition holds that it was served by the local {{ill|Agatanushi|ja|縣主|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Agatanushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Agatanushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 県主|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 県主}}, an ancient regional administrative officer, during the reign of Emperor Seimu (the 13th emperor of Japan). Later, in {{ill|1488|en|1488|qid=Q4853|lt=1488|1=1488}} (Chōkyō 2), when {{ill|Sakai Sadataka|ja|酒井定隆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakai Sadataka|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakai Sadataka|1=Sakai Sadataka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11644072}} rebuilt {{ill|Toke Castle|ja|土気城|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toke Castle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toke Castle|1=Toke Castle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11423717}}, the shrine was constructed at this location in the northeast as a spiritual barrier against evil ({{ill|kimon|ja|鬼門|1=Kimon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kimon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kimon|qq=}}). Since then, it has been revered as the guardian shrine of the Sakai clan. During the rule of the Tokugawa shogunate, starting from {{ill|1591|en|1591|qid=Q6766|lt=1591|1=1591}} with {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}}, the shrine was granted five koku of red seal land ({{ill|shuinchi|ja|御朱印領|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/shuinchi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/shuinchi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}), making it the only shrine in Sanbu District to receive such patronage from the Tokugawa clan. Although the shrine was destroyed by a wildfire in {{ill|1816|en|1816|qid=Q6953|lt=1816|1=1816}}, it was rebuilt in {{ill|1843|en|1843|qid=Q7629|lt=1843|1=1843}}. In {{ill|1978|en|1978|qid=Q2483|lt=Showa 53|1=1978}}, it was designated as a model shrine by Chiba Prefecture. The great cedar tree (Ōsugi) of Agata Shrine is designated as a {{ill|Natural monument|en|Natural monument|qid=Q23790|lt=Natural Monument of Japan|1=Natural monument}} by Ōamishirasato City. The shrine's address, Toke Tobichi 1876, reflects its history as an {{ill|Enclave and exclave|en|Enclave and exclave|qid=Q15621274|lt=enclave|1=Enclave and exclave}} of the former Toke Town (now part of {{ill|Midori-ku, Chiba|en|Midori-ku, Chiba|qid=Q926492|lt=Midori-ku, Chiba|1=Midori-ku, Chiba}}). <gallery> agatajinja2.jpg agatajinja3.jpg agatajinja4.jpg </gallery> == Cultural Properties == * **Chiba Prefecture Designated Cultural Property** ** Colored Ema (wooden votive plaque) depicting warriors == Access == Take a bus bound for {{ill|Kimi-no-Mori|ja|季美の森|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimi-no-Mori|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimi-no-Mori|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500720}} from {{ill|Ōami Station|en|Ōami Station|qid=Q5353488|lt=Ōami Station|1=Ōami Station}} on the {{ill|Sotobō Line|en|Sotobō Line|qid=Q670656|lt=Sotobō Line|1=Sotobō Line}}. Get off at "Kimi-no-Mori Entrance" and walk for 6 minutes. {{Shinto-stub|qq=}}
{{translated page|ja|縣神社 (大網白里市)|version=79838968|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:縣神社 (大網白里市)]]
